query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: Two children on swings in an outdoor playground setting. One child wears a red hooded sweatshirt with yellow accents and dark pants, while the other wears a tie-dye shirt in pink, blue, and yellow. A green swing seat and blurred foliage and structures appear in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two children on swings in an outdoor playground setting, rendered with heavy motion blur that streaks colors and forms into horizontal smears. The child in a red hooded sweatshirt and the child in a tie-dye shirt become elongated blurs of color, their figures and the surrounding grass, trees, and playground equipment dissolving into velocity trails that emphasize kinetic energy over recognizable detail.
